title: podman-images: return correct image list
body:
Return and print the correct list of images by add all specified
RepoTags to one image object, and priting them separately in
repository:repotag pairs.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@suse.com>

comments.body: I can look into adding tests, but before I'd love to have some feedback on the change.
LGTM, lets get a test added.
Travis failure is a known flake, restarting the job
@vrothberg yeah looks great. lets get a test added (i can help you with that) and the PAPR tests run.  Thanks for the help
@baude, @rhatdan  I added another commit to the PR extending the e2e test.

:pushpin: Commit a443aff has been approved by `rhatdan`
